prompt: Change the color of all tree and bush leaves to hues of red, orange, and yellow for an autumn setting.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Recolor all green foliage elements, including the leaves of the various trees (deciduous and conifer types) and the leaves of the bushes, small plants, and scattered ground foliage, to hues of red, orange, and yellow to represent an autumn setting.
objects: Deciduous trees with red, orange, and yellow leaves
Conifer trees with red, orange, and yellow needles
Bushes with red, orange, and yellow foliage
Small plants with red, orange, and yellow foliage
Grass with red, orange, and yellow hues
Scattered ground foliage with red, orange, and yellow hues
Rocks with red, orange, and yellow moss
